arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Pep Guardiola eyes ambitious Jamal Musiala, Florian Wirtz moves as part of five-man wishlist?
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly keen on Bayern Munich's Jamal Musiala and Florian Wirtz of Bayer Leverkusen ahead of the upcoming January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca tips Premier League star sold by Man City for 'important' England role
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca previously worked with Ipswich striker Liam Delap at Manchester City and he believes the 21-year-old can go on to become a key player for England

arts.ttl: Brighton, Manchester City and Barcelona sent transfer officials to same club on Saturday
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion, Manchester City and Barcelona were among the clubs to have a scout present on Saturday at the Estádio do Dragão to watch the derby between FC Porto and Boavista. Porto are currently leading the Portuguese league table, but both Benfica and Sporting have a game in hand on them. arts.ttl: “You never know” – Man United fan favourite teases January move to Man City
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Cristiano Ronaldo has invited the fury of the fans that love and adore him at Old Trafford. The attacker won three Premier League titles with Man United under the management of Sir Alex Ferguson and won the Ballon d’Or during his time with the Premier League giants. arts.ttl: Man City begin search for Kyle Walker's replacement with Premier League star picked

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Man City live early team news plus kick-off time and how to watch
arts.sum: Manchester City take on Leicester City at the King Power Stadium in the Premier League looking to turn their awful form around

arts.ttl: Manchester City’s Kerstin Casparij: ‘When you think it can’t get any more detailed, it can’
arts.sum: Dutch right-back on why she feels at home in Manchester, the workings of Gareth Taylor and excitement for Euro 2025 The Manchester City full-back Kerstin Casparij grins when her girlfriend, Ruth Brown, is asked whether she can keep up with the elite athlete when they go on runs together in the off-season: “Yes, I can slow down for her,” quips Brown, remarkably straight-faced. Life is good for Casparij and Brown. They have bought a house in Manchester which, bar the new sofa hunt, they have nearly finished decorating; their cats, Kiwi and Mango, have got to grips with the stairs after moving from their flat and have picked out their favourite window sills for lounging on; and they recently completed the cooperative video game It Takes Two. When we sit down over coffee in London, they’re arguing over who has to deal with the giblets when they cook for Casparij’s family on Christmas Day and are getting ready to host their families together, for the first time, on Boxing Day. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo points blame for Man City struggles after transfer disagreement
arts.sum: Manchester City have endured an awful season, winning just one of their last 13 games in all competitions, with Cristiano Ronaldo now issuing a blunt diagnosis of their problems
